emergency_definition: No heat when it's below 30 degrees outside
No AC when it's above 95 degrees outside
non_emergency_routing_rules: Tell caller we're closed, give business hours, ask to call back or leave name and number for callback the next business day

call_transfer_rules.business_hours: Transfer all calls to main office line: 720-555-0100

integration_constraints: Do not create jobs or touch ServiceTitan directly
after_hours_flow_summary: Route emergency calls to on-call technician, non-emergency calls told to call back during business hours
office_hours_flow_summary: Transfer all calls to main office line
notes: Use ServiceTitan for field service management
Seasonal consideration: Winter (November to February) may require additional on-call technicians
